pushState · popState SPA Navigation (No Page Reload)
🏠 Home
You are on the home page. URL: /. Navigate above — no page reload occurs, history.pushState fires.
Shadow DOM Shadow DOM Elements

⚑ Elements above are inside closed/open Shadow DOM. Standard event listeners on document may NOT capture these via event.target — you need composedPath() or the sel operator on the shadow root.

iFrame Embedded iFrame Elements
iframe://sandbox — same-origin embedded frame

⚑ Events inside iFrame cannot be observed from parent via normal addEventListener unless same-origin. Cross-origin iFrames are invisible to parent document selectors.

MutationObserver Dynamic DOM Updates
No dynamic nodes yet — click Add Node.
